revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Transclude/doc]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Transclude/doc]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Moving [[:Category:Wikipedia utility templates]] to [[:Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2024 August 19#Category:Wikipedia utility templates]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Moving [[:Category:Wikipedia utility templates]] to [[:Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2024 August 19#Category:Wikipedia utility templates]]
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
